C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -Wl,--version-script=C:/Users/amelc/Code/personal/projects/roguelike/build/_deps/sdl3-src/src/dynapi/SDL_dynapi.sym -Wl,--no-undefined -static-libgcc -shared -o SDL3.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libSDL3.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir\linkLibs.rsp
